effects_provenance.raw: Cap Junkie - THCA BULK Flower - Indoor Exotic 1 Pound Cap Junkie – Bold and Energizing Hybrid Cap Junkie is a standout hybrid strain, celebrated for its distinct flavor and dynamic effects. This strain offers a flavorful combination of sharp diesel, spicy herbal notes, and hints of citrus, creating an invigorating and memorable experience. Cap Junkie is the ultimate choice for those seeking a balance between mental clarity and physical ease, making it suitable for both productivity and relaxation. Type: Hybrid Cap Junkie strikes a perfect balance as a hybrid, providing uplifting cerebral effects paired with subtle body relaxation. Ideal for daytime focus or winding down in the evening, this strain adapts to your needs and activities. Terpene Profile The flavor and effects of Cap Junkie are powered by its robust terpene profile, offering complexity and richness: Caryophyllene : Adds spicy, peppery undertones and contributes to stress relief. Limonene : Enhances citrusy notes while promoting an upbeat, energized mood. Myrcene : Provides a slight herbal sweetness and aids physical relaxation. Terpinolene : Introduces floral and pine characteristics while heightening creativity and focus. Effects Cap Junkie boasts stimulating cerebral effects, encouraging focus, creativity, and euphoria without overwhelming the senses. As the head high settles, a gentle wave of physical relaxation takes over, soothing tension while keeping you alert and engaged. These balanced effects make Cap Junkie perfect for tackling creative projects, socializing, or unwinding without sacrificing productivity or focus. Discover the bold flavors and versatile effects of Cap Junkie—a hybrid strain designed to elevate your experience and keep you inspired. CALM CARYOPHYLLENE FOCUSED LIMONENE MYRCENE Sungrown UPLIFTED UPLIFTING Gold Standard

effects_provenance.raw: Lemon Gas THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Lemon Gas THCA Flower is a striking hybrid that combines the bright zesty citrus punch of lemon-forward genetics with the bold fuel-driven intensity of a classic gassy lineage. The cultivar produces dense, structurally premium buds with an aromatic profile that opens with a sharp burst of fresh lemon zest balanced by gassy backbone. Effects Lemon Gas delivers a balanced experience that pairs uplifting cerebral euphoria with comfortable body relaxation. The high feels well-rounded and pleasant — suitable for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening flavor-led decompression — with the kind of contrasting character that distinguishes citrus-meets-gas hybrids. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: sharp lemon zest up front, with pungent diesel through the middle and a clean herbal-pine finish on the exhale. Smoke is full and unmistakably contrasting. The terpene profile reads lemon-and-diesel — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Lemon Gas harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Lemon Gas THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Lemon Gas THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Citrus Gas hybrid Lemon THCA Flower Lost In Translation

Its pungent and earthy flavor with prominent notes of lemon and pine offers a satisfyingly robust and bright taste with each draw. SFV OG’s impressive profile is a distinct phenotype of the renowned OG Kush, a lineage known for its potency and iconic aroma. The strong aroma is characterized by sharp pine and fresh lemon, with earthy and diesel undertones, creating an invigorating and classic fragrance. This potent Sativa-dominant hybrid boasts an impressive 31.3% THCa content, delivering a powerful wave of euphoria and significant body relaxation. Ideal for daytime or early evening use, SFV OG offers an uplifting cerebral buzz alongside soothing physical effects without heavy sedation. This strain also features visually appealing buds, often displaying vibrant green hues with a generous dusting of glistening trichomes. We submit each batch of our premium USA-grown SFV OG THCa Flower for third-party lab testing to verify its potency and Farm Bill compliance. When you want a robust smoking experience that delivers uplifting cerebral effects and soothing physical relaxation without knocking you out, explore this iconic Sativa-dominant hybrid that remains a beloved choice. **This product is not available for shipment to the following states: Hawaii, Idaho, Minnesota, Oregon, Rhode Island, Utah, Vermont. Effects Apple Fritter delivers a powerful, well-rounded high that pairs uplifting cerebral euphoria with a comfortably relaxing body buzz. effects_provenance.raw: Cadillac Rainbow THCA 7 grams Total Cannabinoids: 30.09% THCA: 30.09% Δ-9 THC: Cadillac Rainbow THCA blends bright fruity citrus flavors with earthy diesel fuel-like notes. The strain is know for having higher potency and fast acting effects. Generally, the effects begin with a euphoric mood boost that melts mental tension, then ease into a pleasant and soothing bodily sensation. This strain is a great choice for relieving physical pain as well as mental stress, and is known to improve loss of appetite. In its raw form, THCA is non-psychoactive, meaning it does not produce the intoxicating effects commonly associated with THC. However, when exposed to heat, such as through smoking, vaping, or decarboxylation (a process that involves heating the plant material), THCA converts into THC, becoming psychoactive. *Due to the THC present, we recommend that you find what dosage works for you in a comfortable environment and avoid operating heavy machinery.* These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease. All products contain less than 0.3% Δ9 THC. Flower thca Flower Botany Farms

Jealousy – THCa Flower 14g / Jealousy Click here for COA Jealousy strain is a well-balanced hybrid strain (50% indica/50% sativa) made by crossing two impressive strains: Gelato 41 and Sunset Sherbet. This earthy strain has exceptionally high THC levels, around 28-30%, and is perfect for experienced cannabis users. Jealousy THCa strain will bring an uplifting high that will relax you for hours. You’ll then feel creativity coming over you, energizing your brain with motivation to finish any task. On the comedown, you’ll feel a euphoric body high, leaving you happy and maybe giggly. Jealousy strain is a real standout for anyone who loves a potent, well-rounded high with a dash of luxury. This combo brings together the best traits of both parents, delivering a smooth and flavorful experience with a bit of an edge. Visually, Jealousy is striking. The buds are often dense and compact, covered in a thick layer of glistening trichomes that give them a frosty, almost diamond-like appearance. You’ll notice vibrant colors too, with shades of deep green, purple, and a touch of orange pistils that really pop. Aroma-wise, Jealousy is quite enticing. It has a rich, complex scent with strong notes of sweet, citrusy fruit, combined with hints of earthy and pine undertones. It’s like a fresh, fruity dessert with a touch of spice—inviting and intriguing. When it comes to flavor, Jealousy continues to impress. The taste is smooth and sweet, with a fruity, citrusy profile that might remind you of a sherbet or candy. There’s also a subtle earthy undertone that rounds out the flavor, making each puff delicious and satisfying. As for the effects, Jealousy delivers a balanced high that hits both your mind and body. You’ll start with an uplifting, euphoric buzz that boosts your mood and creativity, perfect for socializing or diving into creative projects. As the high progresses, you’ll experience a relaxing body effect that helps ease tension without making you too sleepy or couch-locked. Overall, Jealousy is a fantastic choice if you’re into strains that offer a rich flavor profile and a well-rounded high. It’s great for enhancing social experiences, winding down, or simply enjoying a flavorful smoke. If you’re looking for something that combines sweetness with a bit of sophistication, Jealousy is definitely worth a try! Terpene Profile: Caryophyllene Limonene Myrcene 21.7% THCa 3.5 Grams hybrid Hybrid THCa Flower prem
